title: The Aftermath of Egghead
description: On pages 11–11, this part focuses on Usopp, Saul, Nami, Unknown person #10, Vegapunk, Giants as Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.
scene: Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems like you're doing better, huh, straw hat?!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hey, GIANTS!!

dialogue.speaker: Saul
dialogue.text: That's great, Robin!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: New World, Warland - Elbaf

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Aye!! So you're feeln' fired up now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Then let's have that feast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Bring the food!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Get the booze!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been waitin' for this!! Feel free to pig out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we're going to Elbaf, we may see Saul...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Gaba BA BABA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Give us a toast for the ages, straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vegapunk basically said whoever finds the one piece will shake the world, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, and who do you think's gonna get it and be pirate king?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Hey, that's why I set SAIL in the first place!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I don't care if you're with me or against me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Thanks for helping us out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ZORO!! UFFY IS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 'Cause I'm definitely gonna be King of the Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yeah!!! Cheers!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And so, the ships set course to the Northeast...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: ...to the long-awaited land of the Giants----

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gya ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha Ha

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The Fabled Country of Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Come on then...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Aftermath through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
